name: NetSupport Manager – Installation and Service
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for commonly abused tools with specific registry footprints: PsExec (temporary service key on target), FileZilla (FTP exfiltration), MEGASync (cloud exfiltration with autorun), Advanced IP Scanner (writes even as portable; operational history including scanned IP ranges), and NetSupport Manager (RMM abused as RAT). Includes artifact tips and companion file artifacts.
description: [NetSupport Manager] NetSupport Manager remote access tool installation configuration. Contains gateway server, license, and connection settings.
forensic_value: NetSupport Manager has been extensively used by ransomware groups (Conti, IcedID campaigns) and TA577 as a post-exploitation RAT. Gateway server value reveals attacker-controlled infrastructure. License key may assist attribution. Frequently deployed via malicious email attachments.
